_note: User declares `include: ["src/**/*.ts", "src/**/*.svelte"]` — our overlay mirrors those so user TS modules (route loaders, hooks, $lib helpers, .svelte.ts rune helpers, etc.) stay in the type-check program, not just .svelte sources transitively imported from there. Fires the TS5097 upstream fires: `import ... from './helper.ts'` with a literal `.ts` extension, and the user tsconfig doesn't enable `allowImportingTsExtensions`. Matches upstream's default-strictness. If the user wants to opt into `.ts`-ext imports, they set the flag in their own tsconfig and the overlay inherits it.
